{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hunting Remnants
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hunting Remnants]] is something [[Calan]] uses to get everything he needs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
